name: Protege XS

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C344CA4E-242F-4869-8962-87C388301B81

comment: Protégé XS: Offering an impressive feature set from a compact fixture, the Protégé XS is an LED-powered Beam/Spot/Wash moving head spot luminaire. Designed for applications that require a small unit that delivers big creative potential, it harnesses the power of a 250-watt LED engine to deliver an output of up to 9800 lumens. Packed with beam-shaping tools, it features motorized zoom and focus, two 8-position color wheels, two GOBO wheels (one rotating and replaceable, the other fixed), two rotating prisms (linear and circular), a frost filter and an animation wheel. Ensuring simple integration into any lighting system, the unit features both 5-pin DMX sockets and integrated Aria X2 wireless management.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
All on - all in - all out (fast - slow)
Half open - full access - half open (fast - slow)
Half open - all out - half open (fast - slow)
Effect Reset 2 (Prism Frost Focus and Zoom)
